models.name: gpt-5.5
models.description: Top-tier GPT-5.5 (Copilot /responses endpoint). Used for LLM-as-judge in eval-harness LIVE_JUDGE runs.

models.name: gpt-5.4
models.description: Primary deterministic test model. Available on both /chat/completions and /responses.

models.name: gpt-4.1
models.description: Fallback GPT model for tests that sweep multiple GitHub Copilot models.

models.name: claude-opus-4.7
models.description: Top-tier Claude. Cross-judge candidate against gpt-5.5.

models.name: claude-sonnet-4.6
models.description: Fallback Claude for tests that resolve Claude variants.
